title: MVS Smoke Test
description: Two-scene smoke storyboard. If this renders end-to-end, the full pipeline is wired correctly. Runs in ~30s on CPU.

shots.narration: If you can see this and hear my voice, your Motion Voice Studio install is working.

action.subtitle: If you see this and hear voice, the pipeline works.

shots.narration: Audio first. Frames timed to audio. Subtitles soft subbed. Never burned.

action.title: Pipeline Discipline
items: Audio first — measured durations drive timing
Frames timed to audio, never the reverse
